name: Injured near site as pedestrian in Ogden—eligible for claim?

mainEntity.name: Injured near site as pedestrian in Ogden—eligible for claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, sue site owner/contractor for negligence if unsafe.** Utah liable for passersby harms.[3] Key factors: (1) Duty to barricade; (2) personal injury no comp; (3) 4-year limit; (4) witnesses key.[1] Police report, photos, medicals, lawyer sues. Non-workers recover damages fully.
